h35a64b7dg32a2g4dedgae13gb2c321a50479: *As you approach the camp, you hear the sound of a celebration in full swing.*
h45511cd2g68b7g4db8ga457g572ea13083fd: I hope you'll pardon them - they meant to wait for you.
h8fed8a14ga8b8g4edagafa0gb9f48b23586b: But it's been some time since they've had cause to celebrate.
h01d90f33g25feg4cafgb17bga97b5ab6b08d: I'm glad to see they haven't forgotten how. Will you join them?
h3bea418agb0c7g4f92gaad8g588ba9e172ea: We could all use a night off.
h944ff2a4g3e11g4716g919eg92b1c26a065a: I suppose we could, at that. I came out here to think, plan out our next steps.
hbbe91fd7gb9b0g4cb6ga955gda7ae7e8d718: But you're right - the road will still be there in the morning. Come, then.
h3c59b3a2ga169g49e8ga871g993640ab363b: I hope you'll forgive the pageantry - a custom we developed in Avernus.
hb2e08830g8aa3g4c80g8da8g0eb6f73c2d4f: The sky there is utterly black. We took to filling it with stars of our own, to think of better nights in brighter places.
hc7711025g61bcg416dgba05g7d7356afa96d: Nights such as this one - with a light for every life you've saved.
ha1aa9ccagff9cg428bg98f0gf86b88c3a84c: Oh, ah - yes. Volo also wished to show his appreciation.
h6397c370g2fdcg4284gb07egaa16cdebe8ed: Now - we've imposed on you enough. Let's have some music!
hf2667400g67f0g42e2gb3c1g82ba014bfc88: Hope you don't mind the surprise - it's a practice we took up in Avernus.
he7e92669ge34cg4532ga7bag0931e50bc5ea: Not a star to be seen in that sky, so we made our own. Helped us think of better nights in brighter places.
h09317966gda4fg4381g84ceg5c90df95317a: So here you are - a light for every life you've saved.
h978a8a41g90f4g4163g821cg14350efb54ac: Now with all that out of the way - let's have a bloody drink, shall we?
h06f8097fg947ag4334gb990ge0d830cfde0f: They wanted to surprise you. It's a practice left over from our nights in Avernus.
h7a14a6b7gbc83g45efg9d9egb2dfcbed2fdf: Sky there is dead, black as you've ever seen. So we took to filling it with stars of our own.
h179075cbg92d7g4775g9b12g9c5c33979a1f: There you have it - a light for every life you've saved.
he8ca07e5g5124g45b9gbc1eg5ed9fe9ee73c: Oh, aye - bard's prepared something for you and all.
h83b2aaacgf924g4bacg8c89g024947e87fb7: Right. We've got the lights, drink - now it's just for the music.
h775d3b00ge438g4ac7ga690ge9683ed135c8: Nor I, you'll be stunned to learn. But I wasn't much for fighting goblins either, before all this.
hf7e4e25egbc61g4294g9d72g3658ed7640c1: I suppose I can find the courage for a dance. The question is - can you find the courage to watch?
h4ab28852gcc72g48d8g846cg443dafe32221: It's a bit early to celebrate. You're not in Baldur's Gate yet.
h96f1cafdg5c16g4e59g9321g2b539f2e7ac8: The very reason I sought time alone to think. The path ahead is yet... uncertain.
hf32e9641ga3f6g4922gb16dg8768aac65833: But they know that, and choose to celebrate all the same.
he3d2e5a9g8e7ag4485gb7fcg710a5644302b: I've a mind to follow their example. Come - the road will still be there in the morning.
h7084288cge56dg4d42ga844g83920d0ad396: Why aren't you down there with them?
h08af50a6g0b6fg4877gb466g4b92efc534d4: Waiting for you, of course. Can't rightly start without the guest of honour, can we?
hbc97bd30g541fg4febgb372gff2a1c689c06: Ah, the guest of honour! Party can't start without you, you know.
hed050f6cg7d94g4d52g9f88g26c5b0a89941: *In the distance, the sound of laughter and music swells.*
h704f6e8dg0345g4c5fgbbdaga53ea9655d20: Hah. Well - they're getting warmed up, is all. Will you join them?
h6cf63ff4g69fcg47a6g99b1g7891d052f027: Of course. That's my wine you're drinking.
h6ddad731g2379g4346g9844g2c6305c63c38: Don't fret, we won't run dry. We found a few casks of... something in the grove.
h65d21d31gaaceg4813ga09ege39523877dcd: We'd best hurry or there won't be a drop left.
h8b78fb5eg5e66g455ag8f48gc840678042cb: You can face down a pack of goblins, but a bit of polite chatter gives you pause.
h423140a9gfcc4g43ebgb4e5g04d837dae5a2: You've given a us a lot. Let us give a little back.
h3269cca8g42cfg474dgaf48gfdc53f30e87b: Now come on, or there'll be nothing left to drink but pond-water.
hec18aee3g9a67g4327g9b7fg435e5b9e34cf: It's a bit early to celebrate. You're not in Baldur's Gate yet.
he5e4cd66gd196g4bbdg940bg29c81b06d9f4: True enough - but it feels a lot closer than it did this morning.
h2cc7ec31gc98ag4b9dg83c9gbe7b56273802: And that's because of you. Wouldn't be right to part ways without marking it.
h43fd8c83g397cg4e58gbd44g1e0bf7fcb881: Why aren't you down there with them?
ha3a4fb79g668eg4943gaa80gc861d795e1c6: Just... taking a moment. We've come a long way - just a pity Zevlor isn't here to see it.
h181c7bcdg384eg474bg8fe1g5ef6fc9701ca: But come on - wouldn't do to get all misty-eyed with a drink in my hand.
h31f07eb0g15c9g4d30g88bcg0a2e19ffb471: Strange to hear them laughing. I usually prefer a bit of quiet, but it's nice.
h02abc853gfd5dg42feg9d7bg63b286d0ed8e: Of course. That's my wine you're drinking.
h456230f7gcc48g4175g8cc0g78a206c50461: Then we'd best get you down there before there's naught left but pondwater. Come on.
h1deb4dacga7e8g4867gaa1bgb56d3212032a: Aye, me neither. But I ain't planning on suffering it alone - so come on.
h6090fc0fgc0ecg476ag894dg4b13b74a493d: It's a bit early to celebrate. You're not in Baldur's Gate yet.
h69efccfeg01fdg471agbe41gfbb1695b3ae9: Oh, I reckon they know. They'd have to pay for wine in the city for one thing, instead of just drinking yours.
ha4b44d29g31cdg4e1fgbf74g17a89853f25f: Now on you come - I'm told it's rude to be late to your own party.
hb01ec073gf085g47a8gbf06g1484f2a5e082: Why aren't you down there with them?
h0e4ef26ageb90g499dgb416g2a17589f1c87: Had notions of slipping away, mapping the road ahead.
hdc4c184cg3cbeg46cagab40gad0550a4f0cc: Can't rightly abandon the guest of honour though, can I? Come on, then.
